# Honeymark — AI-Friendly Summary

Honeymark is a premium B2B honey supplier based in the Baltic region, specializing in wholesale and bulk honey distribution to businesses across Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia, and Poland.

## What We Do
- Supply high-quality natural honey to retailers, food manufacturers, and hospitality businesses (HORECA)
- Offer flexible packaging: bulk barrels, retail jars, and private-label options
- Ensure full traceability and certified food-safety compliance

## Product Range
1. Rapeseed honey — light and mild, ideal for general retail
2. Buckwheat honey — dark, rich, and nutrient-dense
3. Polyfloral honey — balanced multi-flower blend
4. Creamed honey — smooth spreadable texture
5. Organic honey — certified organic sourcing
6. Private-label honey — custom branding for retailers

## Why Choose Honeymark
- Direct sourcing from trusted beekeepers across the Baltic region
- Consistent quality with lab-tested batches
- Reliable logistics and temperature-controlled delivery
- Competitive wholesale pricing and flexible MOQs

## Markets
Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia, Poland

## Contact
Website: https://honeymark.eu
Email: hello@honeymark.eu
